title: Cadmium
description: Cadmium is the element with the lowest coefficient of friction this modpack aims to keep Minecraft running as smooth as Cadmium with the least amount of bloat
body:
# Description
Cadmium is the element with the lowest coefficient of friction this modpack aims to keep Minecraft running as smooth as Cadmium with the least amount of bloat

# Notes
Cadmium is Based open Simply Optimized with my own tweaks and aditional mods, I donno how it runs so good Simply Optimized is dark magic.
